description_long: This is a rectangular juice carton with a predominantly light gray body and a pastel green and pink band near the top. The front and back feature a bold silhouette of a muscular human figure, with the text 'leche papu by Tommy' in red and green at the bottom. The sides of the carton display a detailed nutrition facts panel, printed in black on a white background. The top of the carton is folded into a classic gable shape, with a small spout for pouring, and is accented by a green and red stripe. The overall design is modern and eye-catching, with a focus on fitness and nutrition.
description: A light gray juice carton with pastel green and pink accents, featuring a muscular silhouette and nutrition facts on the sides.
description_view_0: Front view shows the muscular silhouette and 'leche papu by Tommy' branding at the bottom.
description_view_1: Side view displays the nutrition facts panel and the gable top with colored stripes.
description_view_2: Back view mirrors the front, with the same silhouette and branding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again shows the nutrition facts panel and gable top.
